title: scilla peruviana subsp. glabra
intro: Scilla peruviana subsp. glabra, also known as the Glabrous Scilla or Naked Scilla, is a plant species within the Asparagaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scilla peruviana subsp. glabra include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Traditionally, it is prepared as a herbal tea, ointment, or tincture, often used externally to alleviate symptoms and promote wound healing.
